name: @livepeer-network-modules/daydream-portal-admin
description: Daydream-portal operator admin SPA. Tiny by design: waitlist queue (approve/reject) + per-customer + operator-wide usage rollups. No moderation, no BullMQ.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && mkdir -p dist/components && cp src/components/*.css dist/components/ 2>/dev/null || true
